requirement_topic.en: Wireless / Radio Approval (ENACOM) and Electrical-Safety Conformity for Power Banks
requirement_topic.zh: 移动电源的无线/电信核准（ENACOM）与电气安全合格评定
requirement_topic.zht: 行動電源的無線/電信核准（ENACOM）與電氣安全合格評定

summary.en: Power banks (portable battery packs with integrated charging circuitry, USB outputs, and display) are low-voltage electrical apparatus that must satisfy the Secretaria de Comercio electrical-safety certification and bear the S-mark where in scope. If the power bank incorporates any wireless functionality (e.g., Qi wireless-charging output, Bluetooth state-of-charge indicator, NFC), it additionally requires type approval (homologacion) from ENACOM (Ente Nacional de Comunicaciones), Argentina's telecom/radio regulator, before it can be imported and sold. ENACOM homologacion confirms the device operates within the Argentine radio-spectrum allocations and meets the applicable technical requirements. Unlike the EU, Argentina does not operate a horizontal EMC directive with mandatory emissions/immunity certification for all electronics; EMC concerns are addressed within the S-mark electrical-safety scheme and the ENACOM radio framework rather than as a standalone CE-style EMC marking.
summary.zh: 移动电源（集成充电电路、USB输出及显示屏的便携式电池组）属于低压电气装置，在适用范围内须通过贸易秘书处电气安全认证并加贴S标志。若移动电源含任何无线功能（如Qi无线充电输出、蓝牙电量指示、NFC），还须在进口和销售前取得阿根廷电信/无线电监管机构ENACOM（国家通信管理局）的型号核准（homologacion）。ENACOM核准确认设备在阿根廷无线电频谱分配内运行并满足适用技术要求。与欧盟不同，阿根廷不实行对所有电子产品强制发射/抗扰度认证的横向EMC指令；EMC事项在S标志电气安全制度和ENACOM无线电框架内处理，而非作为独立的CE式EMC标识。
summary.zht: 行動電源（整合充電電路、USB輸出及顯示幕的便攜式電池組）屬於低壓電氣裝置，在適用範圍內須通過貿易秘書處電氣安全認證並加貼S標誌。若行動電源含任何無線功能（如Qi無線充電輸出、藍牙電量指示、NFC），還須在進口和銷售前取得阿根廷電信/無線電監管機構ENACOM（國家通信管理局）的型號核准（homologacion）。ENACOM核准確認設備在阿根廷無線電頻譜分配內運行並滿足適用技術要求。與歐盟不同，阿根廷不實行對所有電子產品強制發射/抗擾度認證的橫向EMC指令；EMC事項在S標誌電氣安全制度和ENACOM無線電框架內處理，而非作為獨立的CE式EMC標識。

standards_or_laws: ENACOM homologacion (type approval) regime — Ente Nacional de Comunicaciones, required for radio/telecom equipment placed on the Argentine market
Resolucion 169/2018 and successors — Secretaria de Comercio electrical-safety certification (S-mark) covering low-voltage electrical equipment
IRAM/IEC standards applied within the S-mark scheme

summary.en: China's domestic EMC requirements for electronic products are governed by GB/T 9254.1-2021 (radio disturbance, Class B) for emissions and GB/T 17618-2015 for immunity. Products with wireless functions require SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China) type approval administered by MIIT, which is specific to Chinese radio frequencies and protocol implementations. Chinese GB/T EMC test reports and SRRC approval are NOT recognised by ENACOM and do not satisfy the Argentine S-mark electrical-safety scheme; ENACOM homologacion is a separate Argentine process.
summary.zh: 中国电子产品国内EMC要求：辐射方面适用GB/T 9254.1-2021（无线电骚扰，B类），抗扰度方面适用GB/T 17618-2015。含无线功能的产品须取得由工业和信息化部管理的SRRC（国家无线电管理委员会）型号核准，具体适用于中国无线电频段和协议实现。中国GB/T EMC检测报告及SRRC核准不被ENACOM认可，也不能满足阿根廷S标志电气安全制度；ENACOM核准（homologacion）属独立的阿根廷流程。
summary.zht: 中國電子產品國內EMC要求：輻射方面適用GB/T 9254.1-2021（無線電騷擾，B類），抗擾度方面適用GB/T 17618-2015。含無線功能的產品須取得由工業和信息化部管理的SRRC（國家無線電管理委員會）型號核准，具體適用於中國無線電頻段和協議實現。中國GB/T EMC檢測報告及SRRC核准不被ENACOM認可，也不能滿足阿根廷S標誌電氣安全制度；ENACOM核准（homologacion）屬獨立的阿根廷流程。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254.1-2021 — Information technology equipment — Radio disturbance characteristics — Part 1: Class B equipment (SAC/SAMR)
GB/T 17618-2015 — Information technology equipment — Immunity characteristics — Limits and methods of measurement (SAC)
SRRC type approval — State Radio Regulation of China, MIIT — required for products with wireless functions sold in China

gap.en: For non-wireless power banks the Argentine gap is essentially the S-mark electrical-safety certification (covered separately) — Argentina has no standalone CE-style EMC marking, so there is no separate mandatory EMC certificate as in the EU. For wireless power banks the decisive gap is ENACOM homologacion: (1) the device must operate only within Argentine spectrum allocations and may not transmit in nationally restricted bands; (2) Chinese SRRC approval is not transferable and a fresh ENACOM type-approval file is required; (3) homologacion must be filed by a locally registered party (the importer with CUIT), with documentation in Spanish. Many Chinese power banks tuned for the domestic market may use channel or protocol parameters that require re-characterisation to satisfy ENACOM. EMC performance is assessed within the S-mark/ENACOM frameworks rather than via an independent EMC certificate.
gap.zh: 对于非无线移动电源，阿根廷差距基本即S标志电气安全认证（另行处理）——阿根廷无独立CE式EMC标识，故不像欧盟那样另设强制EMC证书。对于无线移动电源，决定性差距为ENACOM核准：（1）设备须仅在阿根廷频谱分配内运行，不得在国家限制频段发射；（2）中国SRRC核准不可转移，须重新提交ENACOM型号核准文件；（3）核准须由本地注册方（持CUIT的进口商）提交，文件须为西班牙文。许多面向中国市场调校的移动电源可能采用须重新表征方可满足ENACOM的频道或协议参数。EMC性能在S标志/ENACOM框架内评定，而非通过独立EMC证书。
gap.zht: 對於非無線行動電源，阿根廷差距基本即S標誌電氣安全認證（另行處理）——阿根廷無獨立CE式EMC標識，故不像歐盟那樣另設強制EMC證書。對於無線行動電源，決定性差距為ENACOM核准：（1）設備須僅在阿根廷頻譜分配內運行，不得在國家限制頻段發射；（2）中國SRRC核准不可轉移，須重新提交ENACOM型號核准文件；（3）核准須由本地註冊方（持CUIT的進口商）提交，文件須為西班牙文。許多面向中國市場調校的行動電源可能採用須重新表徵方可滿足ENACOM的頻道或協議參數。EMC性能在S標誌/ENACOM框架內評定，而非透過獨立EMC證書。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where applicable — ENACOM homologacion is required for power banks with wireless functions before import/sale; the S-mark electrical-safety certification applies to in-scope low-voltage apparatus; Argentina has NO standalone EU-style horizontal EMC certificate
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB/T 9254.1 EMC compliance required; SRRC type approval mandatory for wireless products sold in China (administered by MIIT)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Argentina has no standalone CE-style horizontal EMC marking; EMC is handled within the S-mark electrical-safety scheme. The decisive additional requirement for wireless power banks is ENACOM homologacion, which is separate from and not satisfied by Chinese SRRC approval, must be filed by a locally registered importer (CUIT), and may require re-characterisation of channel/protocol parameters to fit Argentine spectrum rules.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 阿根廷无独立CE式横向EMC标识；EMC在S标志电气安全制度内处理。无线移动电源的决定性附加要求为ENACOM核准，其独立于中国SRRC核准且不被其满足，须由本地注册进口商（CUIT）提交，并可能须重新表征频道/协议参数以符合阿根廷频谱规则。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 阿根廷無獨立CE式橫向EMC標識；EMC在S標誌電氣安全制度內處理。無線行動電源的決定性附加要求為ENACOM核准，其獨立於中國SRRC核准且不被其滿足，須由本地註冊進口商（CUIT）提交，並可能須重新表徵頻道/協議參數以符合阿根廷頻譜規則。
